transaction_count_by_period.description: UC-01. Count of financial card transactions in a date range. Uses CARD_TRANSACTIONS.TRANSACTION_DATE with a half-open interval [from_date, to_date).
transaction_count_by_period.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM CARD_TRANSACTIONS WHERE TRANSACTION_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TRANSACTION_DATE <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD')
transaction_count_by_period.returns: DataFrame with a single CNT column.

top_n_transactions_in_period.description: UC-01. Top N largest financial card transactions in a date range, by AMOUNT_LOCAL_CCY (BGN). Use this for 'biggest / largest / top transactions' questions; CARD_AMOUNT is unreliable in DEV.
top_n_transactions_in_period.sql: SELECT TRANSACTION_ID, TRANSACTION_DATE, AMOUNT_LOCAL_CCY, DESCRIPTION FROM (SELECT TRANSACTION_ID, TRANSACTION_DATE, AMOUNT_LOCAL_CCY, DESCRIPTION FROM CARD_TRANSACTIONS WHERE TRANSACTION_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TRANSACTION_DATE <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY AMOUNT_LOCAL_CCY DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= :n

approval_rate_by_channel_daily.description: UC-02. Daily authorization approval rate per channel (ATM, Contactless, POS) from STG_TRANSACTIONS_BORICA_EO. Approved = TRANSACTION_CODE='A'; Declined = TRANSACTION_CODE='N'. Settlement ('D') and journal ('B') rows are excluded — including them double-counts approvals and inflates the rate. Channel classification: POS_ENTRY_MODE LIKE '07%' = Contactless; else MERCHANT_TYPE='6011' = ATM; else POS.
approval_rate_by_channel_daily.sql: WITH classified AS (SELECT TRUNC(TIME_STAMP) AS TRN_DATE, CASE WHEN POS_ENTRY_MODE LIKE '07%' THEN 'Contactless' WHEN MERCHANT_TYPE = '6011' THEN 'ATM' ELSE 'POS' END AS CHANNEL, TRANSACTION_CODE FROM STG_TRANSACTIONS_BORICA_EO WHERE TRANSACTION_CODE IN ('A','N') AND TIME_STAMP IS NOT NULL AND TIME_STAMP >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TIME_STAMP <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD')), agg AS (SELECT TRN_DATE, CHANNEL, SUM(CASE WHEN TRANSACTION_CODE='A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS APPR, SUM(CASE WHEN TRANSACTION_CODE='N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DECL FROM classified GROUP BY TRN_DATE, CHANNEL), rates AS (SELECT TRN_DATE, CHANNEL, ROUND(APPR/NULLIF(APPR+DECL,0)*100,2) AS RATE FROM agg) SELECT TO_CHAR(TRN_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TRN_DATE, MAX(CASE WHEN CHANNEL='ATM' THEN RATE END) AS ATM_PCT, MAX(CASE WHEN CHANNEL='Contactless' THEN RATE END) AS CONTACTLESS_PCT, MAX(CASE WHEN CHANNEL='POS' THEN RATE END) AS POS_PCT FROM rates GROUP BY TRN_DATE ORDER BY TRN_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST :n ROWS ONLY

params.name: from_date
params.description: Inclusive start of the window, YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: to_date
params.description: Exclusive end of the window, YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: n
params.description: Number of most recent days to return.

approval_rate_by_channel_daily.returns: DataFrame: TRN_DATE, ATM_PCT, CONTACTLESS_PCT, POS_PCT (NULL if a channel had no traffic that day).

top_decline_reasons.description: UC-02. Top N decline reasons over a period — distribution of AUTH_RESPONCE_CODE on declined authorizations (TRANSACTION_CODE='N') in STG_TRANSACTIONS_BORICA_EO. Codes are ISO 8583 response codes (e.g. 51=Insufficient funds, 57=Not permitted, 14=Invalid card, 05=Do not honor, 65=Exceeds withdrawal limit, 55=Incorrect PIN); map them at presentation time. Blank/garbage codes are bucketed as 'UNKNOWN'. Note: 'D'/'B' rows are NOT declines and are excluded.
top_decline_reasons.sql: WITH base AS (SELECT NVL(TRIM(AUTH_RESPONCE_CODE),'UNKNOWN') AS RESP_CODE FROM STG_TRANSACTIONS_BORICA_EO WHERE TRANSACTION_CODE = 'N' AND TIME_STAMP IS NOT NULL AND TIME_STAMP >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TIME_STAMP <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD')), tot AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOT FROM base) SELECT RESP_CODE, COUNT(*) AS DECLINES, ROUND(COUNT(*) / NULLIF((SELECT TOT FROM tot),0) * 100, 2) AS PCT FROM base GROUP BY RESP_CODE ORDER BY DECLINES DESC FETCH FIRST :n ROWS ONLY

params.name: from_date
params.description: Inclusive start of the window, YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: to_date
params.description: Exclusive end of the window, YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: n
params.description: Number of top decline codes to return.

top_decline_reasons.returns: DataFrame: RESP_CODE, DECLINES, PCT (share of all declines in the window).

active_cards_by_product.description: UC-05. Count of active cards grouped by CARD_PRODUCTS.NAME. 'Active' = CARDS.STATUS='2' (the issued/usable state — '1'=in production, '2'=active, '3'=closed/canceled, '0'=transient/test). Returned ordered by ACTIVE_CARDS desc; top N.
active_cards_by_product.sql: SELECT cp.NAME AS PRODUCT_NAME, COUNT(*) AS ACTIVE_CARDS FROM CARDS c LEFT JOIN CARD_PRODUCTS cp ON cp.PRODUCT_ID = c.PRODUCT_ID WHERE c.STATUS = '2' GROUP BY cp.NAME ORDER BY ACTIVE_CARDS DESC FETCH FIRST :n ROWS ONLY

params.name: n
params.description: Number of top products to return.

mc_interchange_summary_by_period.description: UC-03. Mastercard interchange (acquiring side) summary for a date range, grouped by currency and debit/credit direction. Source: MC_IRF_ACQUIRING_TT140 — TT140 file reconciliation records. NOTE: SETTLEMENT_DATE in this table is YYMMDD VARCHAR (6 chars). RECONT_AMOUNT is the reconciliation amount; FEE is the interchange fee component. CCY 978=EUR, 840=USD; in DEV, USD rows often have zero amounts. D_C_INDICATOR: 'CR' = credit (we receive), 'DR' = debit (we pay).
mc_interchange_summary_by_period.sql: SELECT CCY, D_C_INDICATOR, COUNT(*) AS ROW_COUNT, SUM(COUNTS) AS TXN_COUNTS, ROUND(SUM(RECONT_AMOUNT),2) AS TOTAL_RECONT_AMOUNT, ROUND(SUM(FEE),2) AS TOTAL_FEE FROM MC_IRF_ACQUIRING_TT140 WHERE SETTLEMENT_DATE >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD'),'YYMMDD') AND SETTLEMENT_DATE <  TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD'),'YYMMDD') GROUP BY CCY, D_C_INDICATOR ORDER BY TOTAL_RECONT_AMOUNT DESC
mc_interchange_summary_by_period.returns: DataFrame: CCY (ISO numeric), D_C_INDICATOR (CR/DR), ROW_COUNT, TXN_COUNTS, TOTAL_RECONT_AMOUNT, TOTAL_FEE.

borica_daily_settlement_net_position.description: UC-04. Daily BORICA settlement net position for the last N days within a date window. Source: BORICA_SETTLEMENT (one or more rows per day, summed). DT_SUM = debit side (we owe), CT_SUM = credit side (owed to us); NET_POSITION_BGN = CT - DT (positive = inflow). Reports also exception count (ERR_ROWS) — non-zero indicates rejected file records that need investigation.
borica_daily_settlement_net_position.sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(SETTLEMENT_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SETTLEMENT_DATE, SUM(DT_COUNT) AS DEBIT_COUNT, ROUND(SUM(DT_SUM),2) AS DEBIT_SUM_BGN, SUM(CT_COUNT) AS CREDIT_COUNT, ROUND(SUM(CT_SUM),2) AS CREDIT_SUM_BGN, ROUND(SUM(CT_SUM) - SUM(DT_SUM),2) AS NET_POSITION_BGN, SUM(CASE WHEN ERR_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ERR_ROWS FROM BORICA_SETTLEMENT WHERE SETTLEMENT_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND SETTLEMENT_DATE <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY SETTLEMENT_DATE ORDER BY SETTLEMENT_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST :n ROWS ONLY

params.name: from_date
params.description: Inclusive start of the window, YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: to_date
params.description: Exclusive end of the window, YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: n
params.description: Number of most recent days to return.

borica_daily_settlement_net_position.returns: DataFrame: SETTLEMENT_DATE, DEBIT_COUNT, DEBIT_SUM_BGN, CREDIT_COUNT, CREDIT_SUM_BGN, NET_POSITION_BGN, ERR_ROWS.

visa_settlement_summary_by_period.description: UC-04. Visa settlement summary for a date range, grouped by report type and credit/debit direction. Source: VISA_SETTLEMENT. NOTE: SETTLEMENT_DATE is YYYYMMDD VARCHAR (8 chars). REPORT_TYPE values include V4120/V4130/V4140 (different scheme report variants); AMT_SETTLEMENT_INDICATOR: 'CR' = credit, 'DB' = debit, blank = informational/zero-amount row. Aggregates CNT and AMT_SETTLEMENT.
visa_settlement_summary_by_period.sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SETTLEMENT_DATE,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SETTLEMENT_DATE, REPORT_TYPE, AMT_SETTLEMENT_INDICATOR, SUM(CNT) AS TXN_CNT, ROUND(SUM(AMT_SETTLEMENT),2) AS TOTAL_SETTLEMENT_AMT FROM VISA_SETTLEMENT WHERE SETTLEMENT_DATE >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD'),'YYYYMMDD') AND SETTLEMENT_DATE <  TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD'),'YYYYMMDD') GROUP BY SETTLEMENT_DATE, REPORT_TYPE, AMT_SETTLEMENT_INDICATOR ORDER BY SETTLEMENT_DATE DESC, REPORT_TYPE, AMT_SETTLEMENT_INDICATOR
visa_settlement_summary_by_period.returns: DataFrame: SETTLEMENT_DATE, REPORT_TYPE, AMT_SETTLEMENT_INDICATOR, TXN_CNT, TOTAL_SETTLEMENT_AMT.

transaction_value_sum_by_period.description: UC-01. Total transaction value (SUM of AMOUNT_LOCAL_CCY in BGN) and count for a date range. Use this for 'total spend / total value for period' questions.
transaction_value_sum_by_period.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(AMOUNT_LOCAL_CCY),2) AS TOTAL_VALUE_BGN, COUNT(*) AS TXN_COUNT FROM CARD_TRANSACTIONS WHERE TRANSACTION_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TRANSACTION_DATE <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD')

top_merchants_by_volume.description: UC-01. Top N merchants by total value for a date range. Joins CARD_TRANSACTIONS to MERCHANTS via MERCHANT_IDN. Only transactions that have a merchant assigned (~52% of all rows — ATM and system transactions are excluded by the inner join).
top_merchants_by_volume.sql: SELECT m.NAME AS MERCHANT_NAME, COUNT(*) AS TXN_COUNT, ROUND(SUM(ct.AMOUNT_LOCAL_CCY),2) AS TOTAL_VALUE_BGN FROM CARD_TRANSACTIONS ct JOIN MERCHANTS m ON m.MERCHANT_IDN = ct.MERCHANT_IDN WHERE ct.TRANSACTION_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND ct.TRANSACTION_DATE <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY m.NAME ORDER BY TOTAL_VALUE_BGN DESC FETCH FIRST :n ROWS ONLY

params.name: n
params.description: Number of top merchants to return.

volume_by_scheme_period.description: UC-01. Transaction volume + value split by payment scheme (Mastercard, Visa, American Express, Other) for a date range. Scheme is derived from CARD_TRANSACTIONS.CARD_COMMUNITY: 'EUR'->Mastercard (Europe MC includes the local BCARD-on-MC product), 'VIS'->Visa, 'AME'->American Express.
volume_by_scheme_period.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN CARD_COMMUNITY = 'EUR' THEN 'Mastercard' WHEN CARD_COMMUNITY = 'VIS' THEN 'Visa' WHEN CARD_COMMUNITY = 'AME' THEN 'American Express' ELSE 'Other' END AS SCHEME, COUNT(*) AS TXN_COUNT, ROUND(SUM(AMOUNT_LOCAL_CCY),2) AS TOTAL_VALUE_BGN FROM CARD_TRANSACTIONS WHERE TRANSACTION_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TRANSACTION_DATE <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY CASE WHEN CARD_COMMUNITY = 'EUR' THEN 'Mastercard' WHEN CARD_COMMUNITY = 'VIS' THEN 'Visa' WHEN CARD_COMMUNITY = 'AME' THEN 'American Express' ELSE 'Other' END ORDER BY TOTAL_VALUE_BGN DESC

new_cards_in_period.description: UC-05. Count of cards opened during a date range, grouped by product. Uses CARDS.OPEN_DATE in [from_date, to_date). Includes all newly-opened cards regardless of current status (so a card opened then closed in the same window still counts as 'new').
new_cards_in_period.sql: SELECT cp.NAME AS PRODUCT_NAME, COUNT(*) AS NEW_CARDS FROM CARDS c LEFT JOIN CARD_PRODUCTS cp ON cp.PRODUCT_ID = c.PRODUCT_ID WHERE c.OPEN_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND c.OPEN_DATE <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY cp.NAME ORDER BY NEW_CARDS DESC FETCH FIRST :n ROWS ONLY

params.name: n
params.description: Number of top products to return.

closed_cards_in_period.description: UC-05. Count of cards closed (STATUS='3') during a date range, grouped by close reason (REASON_CLOSE_ID -> CARD_REASON_CLOSE.REASON_TEXT). NULL reason rows are bucketed as '(none specified)' — note ~50% of closed cards have no recorded reason in DEV.
closed_cards_in_period.sql: SELECT NVL(crc.REASON_TEXT,'(none specified)') AS CLOSE_REASON, COUNT(*) AS CLOSED_CARDS FROM CARDS c LEFT JOIN CARD_REASON_CLOSE crc ON crc.CLOSE_REASON_ID = c.REASON_CLOSE_ID WHERE c.STATUS = '3' AND c.STATUS_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND c.STATUS_DATE <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY crc.REASON_TEXT ORDER BY CLOSED_CARDS DESC FETCH FIRST :n ROWS ONLY

params.name: n
params.description: Number of top reasons to return.

file_processing_status_period.description: UC-04. File processing status counts for a date range, grouped by DIRECTION (I=Incoming, O=Outgoing) and STATUS (BG text: 'Обработен'=Processed, 'Грешка при обработка'=Processing error). Source: REPORT_FILES_PROCESSED_V. Use this to answer 'how many files were sent / accepted / rejected' style questions.
file_processing_status_period.sql: SELECT DIRECTION, STATUS, COUNT(*) AS FILES_COUNT, COUNT(DISTINCT TRUNC(PROCESS_DATE)) AS DAYS_OBSERVED FROM REPORT_FILES_PROCESSED_V WHERE PROCESS_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND PROCESS_DATE <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY DIRECTION, STATUS ORDER BY FILES_COUNT DESC
file_processing_status_period.returns: DataFrame: DIRECTION (I/O), STATUS (BG text), FILES_COUNT, DAYS_OBSERVED.

active_cards_by_office.description: UC-05. Active cards (CARDS.STATUS='2') distributed by issuing office. Joins CARDS.OFFICE_OWNER_ID -> OFFICES.OFFICE_ID. Use for 'cards per branch / regional distribution' questions. Cards without an office_owner (rare) are bucketed as '(no office)'. Ordered by ACTIVE_CARDS desc; top N.
active_cards_by_office.sql: SELECT NVL(o.NAME,'(no office)') AS OFFICE_NAME, COUNT(*) AS ACTIVE_CARDS FROM CARDS c LEFT JOIN OFFICES o ON o.OFFICE_ID = c.OFFICE_OWNER_ID WHERE c.STATUS = '2' GROUP BY o.NAME ORDER BY ACTIVE_CARDS DESC FETCH FIRST :n ROWS ONLY

params.name: n
params.description: Number of top offices to return.

auth_latency_p95_daily.description: UC-02. Daily bank-side authorization processing latency from CARD_AUTHORIZATIONS. Measures the interval between TIME_STAMP (auth record received - 'точно време на постъпване в базата') and SEND_DATE (response message sent towards BORICA - 'дата на която е изпратено съобщението към BORIKA'). NOT the full round-trip auth latency seen at the POS - this is the internal pipeline portion only. Returns per-day count + P50/P95/P99 latency in seconds (PERCENTILE_CONT) + MAX. Rows with SEND_DATE IS NULL (~0.0004% of rows in DEV) are excluded. Note (DEV): table is populated from 2023-01-03 to 2023-11-10; pick a window inside that range. Outliers (MAX_SEC >> P99_SEC) usually indicate batch-resent or stuck records, not real-time auth latency.
auth_latency_p95_daily.sql: WITH lat AS (SELECT TRUNC(TIME_STAMP) AS AUTH_DATE, (EXTRACT(DAY FROM (SEND_DATE - TIME_STAMP))*86400 + EXTRACT(HOUR FROM (SEND_DATE - TIME_STAMP))*3600 + EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM (SEND_DATE - TIME_STAMP))*60 + EXTRACT(SECOND FROM (SEND_DATE - TIME_STAMP))) AS LAT_SEC FROM CARD_AUTHORIZATIONS WHERE TIME_STAMP >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TIME_STAMP <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND SEND_DATE IS NOT NULL) SELECT TO_CHAR(AUTH_DATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS AUTH_DATE, COUNT(*) AS N, ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY LAT_SEC),3) AS P50_SEC, ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY LAT_SEC),3) AS P95_SEC, ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY LAT_SEC),3) AS P99_SEC, ROUND(MAX(LAT_SEC),3) AS MAX_SEC FROM lat GROUP BY AUTH_DATE ORDER BY AUTH_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST :n ROWS ONLY

params.name: from_date
params.description: Inclusive start of the window, YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: to_date
params.description: Exclusive end of the window, YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: n
params.description: Number of most recent days to return.

auth_latency_p95_daily.returns: DataFrame: AUTH_DATE, N, P50_SEC, P95_SEC, P99_SEC, MAX_SEC.

portfolio_churn_rate_period.description: UC-05. Per-product card churn rate for a date range. Denominator = active at start of period (cards with OPEN_DATE < from_date AND (STATUS='2' OR STATUS_DATE >= from_date) - i.e. cards that existed and were not yet closed at from_date). Numerator = cards closed during the window (STATUS='3' AND STATUS_DATE in [from_date, to_date)). CHURN_PCT = closed / active_at_start * 100. Top N products by ACTIVE_AT_START. Note (DEV): closed-card history exists only from 2023 onwards; pick a window inside 2023-2024 for non-zero churn.
portfolio_churn_rate_period.sql: SELECT cp.NAME AS PRODUCT_NAME, SUM(CASE WHEN c.OPEN_DATE < TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND (c.STATUS = '2' OR c.STATUS_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ACTIVE_AT_START, SUM(CASE WHEN c.STATUS = '3' AND c.STATUS_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND c.STATUS_DATE < TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CLOSED_IN_PERIOD, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN c.STATUS = '3' AND c.STATUS_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND c.STATUS_DATE < TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN c.OPEN_DATE < TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND (c.STATUS = '2' OR c.STATUS_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD')) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) * 100, 2) AS CHURN_PCT FROM CARDS c LEFT JOIN CARD_PRODUCTS cp ON cp.PRODUCT_ID = c.PRODUCT_ID GROUP BY cp.NAME ORDER BY ACTIVE_AT_START DESC FETCH FIRST :n ROWS ONLY

params.name: from_date
params.description: Inclusive start of the window, YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: to_date
params.description: Exclusive end of the window, YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: n
params.description: Number of top products to return.

approval_rate_period_compare.description: UC-02. Authorization approval-rate comparison between two date windows, broken down by channel (ATM / Contactless / POS). Same A/N selection rules as approval_rate_by_channel_daily ('D' settlement and 'B' journal rows excluded). Channel classification: POS_ENTRY_MODE LIKE '07%' = Contactless; else MERCHANT_TYPE='6011' = ATM; else POS. Returns one row per channel with: current/previous approved & declined counts, current/previous approval rate, and the delta in percentage points (CURR_RATE - PREV_RATE). Caller controls both windows so it works for week-over-week, month-over-month, or any custom compare. DEV window: STG_TRANSACTIONS_BORICA_EO is populated through 2023; pick both windows inside that range.
approval_rate_period_compare.sql: WITH classified AS (SELECT CASE WHEN POS_ENTRY_MODE LIKE '07%' THEN 'Contactless' WHEN MERCHANT_TYPE = '6011' THEN 'ATM' ELSE 'POS' END AS CHANNEL, TRANSACTION_CODE, CASE WHEN TIME_STAMP >= TO_DATE(:current_from,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TIME_STAMP <  TO_DATE(:current_to,'YYYY-MM-DD') THEN 'CURRENT' WHEN TIME_STAMP >= TO_DATE(:previous_from,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TIME_STAMP <  TO_DATE(:previous_to,'YYYY-MM-DD') THEN 'PREVIOUS' END AS PERIOD FROM STG_TRANSACTIONS_BORICA_EO WHERE TRANSACTION_CODE IN ('A','N') AND TIME_STAMP IS NOT NULL AND ((TIME_STAMP >= TO_DATE(:current_from,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TIME_STAMP <  TO_DATE(:current_to,'YYYY-MM-DD')) OR (TIME_STAMP >= TO_DATE(:previous_from,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TIME_STAMP <  TO_DATE(:previous_to,'YYYY-MM-DD')))), agg AS (SELECT CHANNEL, PERIOD, SUM(CASE WHEN TRANSACTION_CODE='A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS APPR, SUM(CASE WHEN TRANSACTION_CODE='N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DECL FROM classified GROUP BY CHANNEL, PERIOD), pivoted AS (SELECT CHANNEL, SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD='CURRENT'  THEN APPR ELSE 0 END) AS CURR_APPR, SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD='CURRENT'  THEN DECL ELSE 0 END) AS CURR_DECL, SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD='PREVIOUS' THEN APPR ELSE 0 END) AS PREV_APPR, SUM(CASE WHEN PERIOD='PREVIOUS' THEN DECL ELSE 0 END) AS PREV_DECL FROM agg GROUP BY CHANNEL) SELECT CHANNEL, CURR_APPR, CURR_DECL, ROUND(CURR_APPR / NULLIF(CURR_APPR+CURR_DECL,0) * 100, 2) AS CURR_RATE, PREV_APPR, PREV_DECL, ROUND(PREV_APPR / NULLIF(PREV_APPR+PREV_DECL,0) * 100, 2) AS PREV_RATE, ROUND(CURR_APPR / NULLIF(CURR_APPR+CURR_DECL,0) * 100 - PREV_APPR / NULLIF(PREV_APPR+PREV_DECL,0) * 100, 2) AS RATE_DELTA_PP FROM pivoted ORDER BY CHANNEL
approval_rate_period_compare.returns: DataFrame: CHANNEL, CURR_APPR, CURR_DECL, CURR_RATE, PREV_APPR, PREV_DECL, PREV_RATE, RATE_DELTA_PP.

interchange_by_scheme_period.description: UC-03. Card-scheme interchange (acquirer/issuer netting) for a date window, derived from CARD_TRANSACTIONS.INTERBANK_CHARGE_FEE - the per-transaction interchange amount in BGN, signed: positive = received by bank, negative = paid by bank. NOTE: this is the authoritative Visa+MC interchange source for this bank in DEV - the dedicated VISA_INT_254 / MC TT140 IRF views are empty because the bank has no Visa data-subscription, so per-transaction INTERBANK_CHARGE_FEE is the canonical workaround. Scheme labels: 'Mastercard' = CARD_COMMUNITY 'EUR', 'Visa' = 'VIS', 'AmEx' = 'AME', 'Borica' = 'BOR', 'Local' = 'LOC'. Returns per-scheme: total txns, txns carrying a non-zero fee, INTERCHANGE_NET (sum), INTERCHANGE_INCOME (positives), INTERCHANGE_EXPENSE (negatives).
interchange_by_scheme_period.sql: SELECT CASE CARD_COMMUNITY WHEN 'EUR' THEN 'Mastercard' WHEN 'VIS' THEN 'Visa' WHEN 'AME' THEN 'AmEx' WHEN 'BOR' THEN 'Borica' WHEN 'LOC' THEN 'Local' ELSE CARD_COMMUNITY END AS SCHEME, COUNT(*) AS TXN_COUNT, SUM(CASE WHEN INTERBANK_CHARGE_FEE IS NOT NULL AND INTERBANK_CHARGE_FEE <> 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TXN_WITH_FEE, ROUND(SUM(NVL(INTERBANK_CHARGE_FEE,0)),2) AS INTERCHANGE_NET_BGN, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN INTERBANK_CHARGE_FEE > 0 THEN INTERBANK_CHARGE_FEE ELSE 0 END),2) AS INTERCHANGE_INCOME_BGN, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN INTERBANK_CHARGE_FEE < 0 THEN INTERBANK_CHARGE_FEE ELSE 0 END),2) AS INTERCHANGE_EXPENSE_BGN FROM CARD_TRANSACTIONS WHERE TRANSACTION_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TRANSACTION_DATE <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY CARD_COMMUNITY ORDER BY TXN_COUNT DESC
interchange_by_scheme_period.returns: DataFrame: SCHEME, TXN_COUNT, TXN_WITH_FEE, INTERCHANGE_NET_BGN, INTERCHANGE_INCOME_BGN, INTERCHANGE_EXPENSE_BGN.

fee_income_summary_by_period.description: UC-03. End-to-end card-business fee income summary in BGN for a date window. Aggregates 6 streams: (1) CARDHOLDER_TXN_FEE - CARD_TRANSACTIONS.CHARGE_AMOUNT_LOCAL (cardholder transaction fee, in local BGN); (2) MERCHANT_TXN_FEE - CARD_TRANSACTIONS.CHARGE_AMOUNT_POS_LOCAL (merchant transaction fee); (3) INTERCHANGE_NET - CARD_TRANSACTIONS.INTERBANK_CHARGE_FEE (signed net; negative = paid by bank); (4) CCY_CONVERSION_FEE - CARD_TRANSACTIONS.CHARGE_AMOUNT_CCY_CONV_LOCAL (Piraeus FX-conversion fee); (5) CARD_NONTXN_FEE - CHARGE_EVENTS where STATUS='3' (realized non-transaction card fees: MONTHLY_FEE_CARD, BALANSATM, NEW_CARD, CLOSE_CARD, etc.); (6) DEVICE_NONTXN_FEE - MERCHANT_CHARGE_EVENTS where STATUS='3' (realized non-transaction device fees: DEVICE_MONTH_FEE etc.). Streams 1-4 filtered by TRANSACTION_DATE; streams 5-6 filtered by TIME_ACCOUNTING (when the fee was posted). Non-BGN amounts in CHARGE_EVENTS / MERCHANT_CHARGE_EVENTS are converted with the fixed BGN<->EUR rate 1.95583 (BNB-fixed); other currencies are summed at face value. TOTAL is the algebraic sum.
fee_income_summary_by_period.sql: WITH txn AS (SELECT ROUND(SUM(NVL(CHARGE_AMOUNT_LOCAL,0)),2) AS CARDHOLDER_TXN_FEE_BGN, ROUND(SUM(NVL(CHARGE_AMOUNT_POS_LOCAL,0)),2) AS MERCHANT_TXN_FEE_BGN, ROUND(SUM(NVL(INTERBANK_CHARGE_FEE,0)),2) AS INTERCHANGE_NET_BGN, ROUND(SUM(NVL(CHARGE_AMOUNT_CCY_CONV_LOCAL,0)),2) AS CCY_CONVERSION_FEE_BGN FROM CARD_TRANSACTIONS WHERE TRANSACTION_DATE >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TRANSACTION_DATE <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD')), ce AS (SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN CHARGE_CURRENCY_CHAR_CODE = 'BGN' THEN NVL(CHARGE_AMOUNT,0) WHEN CHARGE_CURRENCY_CHAR_CODE = 'EUR' THEN NVL(CHARGE_AMOUNT,0)*1.95583 ELSE NVL(CHARGE_AMOUNT,0) END),2) AS CARD_NONTXN_FEE_BGN FROM CHARGE_EVENTS WHERE STATUS = '3' AND TIME_ACCOUNTING >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TIME_ACCOUNTING <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD')), mce AS (SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN CHARGE_CURRENCY_CHAR_CODE = 'BGN' THEN NVL(CHARGE_AMOUNT,0) WHEN CHARGE_CURRENCY_CHAR_CODE = 'EUR' THEN NVL(CHARGE_AMOUNT,0)*1.95583 ELSE NVL(CHARGE_AMOUNT,0) END),2) AS DEVICE_NONTXN_FEE_BGN FROM MERCHANT_CHARGE_EVENTS WHERE STATUS = '3' AND TIME_ACCOUNTING >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TIME_ACCOUNTING <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD')) SELECT t.CARDHOLDER_TXN_FEE_BGN, t.MERCHANT_TXN_FEE_BGN, t.INTERCHANGE_NET_BGN, t.CCY_CONVERSION_FEE_BGN, ce.CARD_NONTXN_FEE_BGN, mce.DEVICE_NONTXN_FEE_BGN, ROUND(NVL(t.CARDHOLDER_TXN_FEE_BGN,0) + NVL(t.MERCHANT_TXN_FEE_BGN,0) + NVL(t.INTERCHANGE_NET_BGN,0) + NVL(t.CCY_CONVERSION_FEE_BGN,0) + NVL(ce.CARD_NONTXN_FEE_BGN,0) + NVL(mce.DEVICE_NONTXN_FEE_BGN,0), 2) AS TOTAL_FEE_INCOME_BGN FROM txn t, ce, mce
fee_income_summary_by_period.returns: Single-row DataFrame: CARDHOLDER_TXN_FEE_BGN, MERCHANT_TXN_FEE_BGN, INTERCHANGE_NET_BGN, CCY_CONVERSION_FEE_BGN, CARD_NONTXN_FEE_BGN, DEVICE_NONTXN_FEE_BGN, TOTAL_FEE_INCOME_BGN.

fee_income_card_events_top_n_period.description: UC-03. Top N realized non-transaction card-fee events for a date window, broken down by EVENT_IDN (event type). Source: CHARGE_EVENTS where STATUS='3' (posted to general ledger). Filter on TIME_ACCOUNTING (the moment status moved 1->2 / fee was sent for accounting). BGN amounts kept as-is; EUR amounts converted at the fixed BGN<->EUR rate 1.95583; other currencies summed at face value. Use this drill-down after fee_income_summary_by_period when CARD_NONTXN_FEE_BGN is large and the breakdown matters. Common event IDs in DEV: MONTHLY_FEE_CARD, BALANSATM (ATM balance inquiry), NOT_APPROVED_AUTH, NEW_CARD, REISSUECARD, CHANGE_PIN_ATM, CLOSE_CARD, MGR_FEE_CARD, CARD_NOT_RECEIVED, MONTHLY_FEE_CARD_ADD, CHACK_LAST_5_TRN, NORMALIZATION.
fee_income_card_events_top_n_period.sql: SELECT EVENT_IDN, COUNT(*) AS EVENT_COUNT, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN CHARGE_CURRENCY_CHAR_CODE = 'BGN' THEN NVL(CHARGE_AMOUNT,0) WHEN CHARGE_CURRENCY_CHAR_CODE = 'EUR' THEN NVL(CHARGE_AMOUNT,0)*1.95583 ELSE NVL(CHARGE_AMOUNT,0) END),2) AS FEE_AMOUNT_BGN FROM CHARGE_EVENTS WHERE STATUS = '3' AND TIME_ACCOUNTING >= TO_DATE(:from_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TIME_ACCOUNTING <  TO_DATE(:to_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') GROUP BY EVENT_IDN ORDER BY FEE_AMOUNT_BGN DESC FETCH FIRST :n ROWS ONLY

params.name: from_date
params.description: Inclusive start of accounting window, YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: to_date
params.description: Exclusive end of accounting window, YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: n
params.description: Number of top event types to return.
